content:
🔹 Concrete Prompt:

Describe your favorite meal using all five senses, but do not name it. Let the reader guess what it is.

🔹 Abstract Prompt:

What role do vivid descriptions play in the way we remember moments in our lives?

🔹 Connecting Prompt:

Think about a scene from a book or movie that was especially vivid. How did the description make it feel real to you?

🔹 Exploratory Prompt:

If you had to describe yourself using only sensory details (without naming any personality traits), how would you do it?


Day 7: Dialogue & Voice in Narrative
📌 Instructions: Choose one of the prompts below to explore in depth.

🔹 Concrete Prompt:

Recall a memorable conversation you’ve had. Write a dialogue-heavy scene that captures the tone, rhythm, and personality of the exchange.

🔹 Abstract Prompt:

How does written dialogue differ from real-life speech? Should dialogue in stories mimic natural speech, or is it better to refine it?
context: From document: Daily Journal Prompts | Weeks 1 - 6 | ENG 101 — chunk 5 (chunk 5/19)
